Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Further Deposition Of Defendant'S Expert Witness Dr. William K. Hoddic, M.D.
Off Calendar Jan-03-2022 Off Calendar

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-12-2021 Text Ruling

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-13-2021 Continued To Oct-12-21 At 11:30 A.M. In Dept 210
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom: Edward Leonard, Esq. and Allison Lawrence, Esq. appearing for the Defendants La Tapatia, Colin Jones, Esq. appearing for the Plaintiff Juan Salgado.

The Court stated that this case has been assigned to department 210 for trial, that the Court received the emails sent by counsels and questioned if the parties are done with discovery. Mr. Jones described his effort and provided an accurate summary. The Court stated that another trial setting conference will be set in order for the Court to obtain the witness lists and estimated amounts of time needed for both direct and cross, that the it is fine to send it by email and explained trial procedures during Covid restrictions. Mr. Jones requested that the trial begin in early October. The Court stated that there are multiple cases ahead of this and parties might be able to go to trial in November.

The Court continued the trial setting to October 12, 2021 at 11:30am in Department 210 for further trial setting. October 05, 2021 is the deadline for the written submission of witness lists and time trial estimates.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Clerk: N. Wong. Matter Not Reported.
